{{Quote|Peace is the absence of opposition.|Thorne Kraym, to Nolan Gillmunn|<ref name="Empire 33">[[Empire 33|''Empire'' 33]]</ref>}}
'''Thorne Kraym''' was the leader of the [[Jabiimi Nationalists]] after [[Alto Stratus]]'s death, and later the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]].

==Biography==
Kraym fought for the Nationalists during the [[Battle of Jabiim]], and [[Death/Legends|killed]] [[Orliss Gillmunn]] in the [[Battle of Hyber Canyon]]. [[0 ABY/Legends|Eight months ABY]], he told [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] much of his father; of how he betrayed his people. Thorne was killed by [[Nolan Gillmunn]] on [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The comic itself names him only as "Thorne"; he is only identified as "Thorne Kraym" in the opening blurb of [[Empire 34|''Empire'' 34]].
